fields.description:
## Description
Duplication analyzer that runs jscpd (external CLI, JSON reporter) for copy/paste clone stats, populating `AnalyzerResult.duplication` (clone count + duplicated-lines fraction).

## Review-driven corrections
- REUSE the existing jscpd seam: `scripts/backfill_complexity_clone_snapshots.py` already runs jscpd with a monkeypatchable runner and reads `statistics.total.clones` from the JSON report — share that helper; name the concrete fields (`statistics.total.clones`, `statistics.total.percentage`).
- jscpd is invoked via `npx jscpd` (documented that way), not a bare PATH binary — detect via the npx invocation, absence -> Unavailable.
- Live in `src/rebar/metrics/analyzers/` (NOT the quarantined `adapters/`, which is documented as imported only by harvest scripts and never by core/registry).
- Use the reused `Unavailable(reason, accruing_since)` sentinel — not a single-arg `Unavailable("jscpd not available")`.

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] `analyzers/jscpd_dup.py` runs jscpd over the scan root, parses `statistics.total` -> clones + percentage; reuses the backfill seam.
- [ ] jscpd/npx unavailable or error -> Unavailable(reason, accruing_since), not a crash and not zeros.
- [ ] Deterministic; no network beyond the local npx invocation.

## Verification
- [ ] Unit with a monkeypatched runner (no jscpd needed in CI); integration test skipped if jscpd absent, over a known-clone fixture.

## Dependencies: 3b30, 9597, e7a0 (siblings). Recorded edges: depends_on 9597, e7a0.
## Files likely touched: src/rebar/metrics/analyzers/jscpd_dup.py (new), scripts/backfill_complexity_clone_snapshots.py (extract shared jscpd runner), tests/unit/metrics/test_jscpd_dup.py (new)
## Estimated scope: M
